items.name: Oldtown Scottsdale Digital Display #1
items.description:
Our Digital Display Advertising network delivers high-impact visual exposure in the heart of Old Town Scottsdale — one of Arizona’s most vibrant entertainment, shopping, and dining destinations.

Strategically positioned within high-traffic corridors, our premium LED screens reach a dynamic audience of locals, tourists, luxury shoppers, nightlife patrons, and business professionals. Content is delivered in full-motion HD, allowing brands to rotate messaging, promote events, showcase products, and run time-sensitive campaigns with precision.

Key Benefits:
• High-visibility placements in prime pedestrian and vehicle traffic zones
• Day and night brightness optimization
• Rotational ad scheduling for campaign flexibility
• Ideal for luxury brands, hospitality, real estate, nightlife, and retail

This is visual dominance in one of the Southwest’s most desirable lifestyle districts.
items.location: 7314 E Osborn Dr Suite A, Scottsdale, AZ 85251

items.name: Oldtown Scottsdale Audio Player #1
items.description:
Our Proprietary Audio Advertising System delivers immersive brand messaging directly into curated Old Town Scottsdale environments.

This exclusive audio network is integrated into select venues and public-facing environments, allowing brands to reach audiences through strategically timed, high-quality audio placements. Unlike traditional radio, messaging is hyper-local — delivered exactly where consumers are shopping, dining, and socializing.

Key Benefits:
• Hyper-local reach in Old Town Scottsdale
• Captive audience environments
• Seamless integration into curated music programming
• Ideal for hospitality, events, entertainment, and experiential campaigns

Your message isn’t just heard — it’s experienced in context.
items.location: 7314 E Osborn Dr Suite A, Scottsdale, AZ 85251

items.name: Oldtown Scottsdale Street Furniture #1
items.description:
Street Furniture Advertising places your brand directly into the daily rhythm of Old Town Scottsdale.

Positioned on bus shelters, pedestrian kiosks, and lifestyle-oriented streetscapes, these placements provide sustained, eye-level exposure in walkable, high-traffic areas. With extended dwell times and repeated impressions, this format builds brand familiarity and trust within one of Arizona’s most affluent and active communities.

Key Benefits:
• Eye-level visibility in walkable districts
• Long exposure times for strong brand recall
• Ideal for real estate, healthcare, retail, events, and local services
• Complements digital and audio campaigns for multi-channel dominance

This is grounded, street-level influence in a destination known for luxury, tourism, and lifestyle appeal.
items.location: 7314 E Osborn Dr Suite A, Scottsdale, AZ 85251
